creator: fedorenko.m.a@gmail.com
text:
After installing kernel 9-CURRENT, which I had compiled with my own config keyboard works not properly.
For example, PageUp and PageDown in VI changes uppercase to lowercase and lowercase to uppercase.
In log was apeared:
Configuring syscons: keymapkbdcontrol: setting keymap: Inappropriate ioctl for device

After installing kernel 8-STABLE, which I had compiled with the same config, excluding debug options, all was ok.
